reviews.review_text: Super freundliches Personal und eine ausgezeichnete Lage. Sanitäranlagen, Küche und Laundry sind perfekt sauber. Der gesamte Platz ist sehr gepflegt und alles ist auf kurzen Wegen erreichbar.

Continual maintenance noise - mowing, edging and chainsaws. Water will not flow out of caravan as outlet for our hose was too high. Very stressful. Unable to use cash in washing machines or dryers - had to use a credit card online. We are return visitors but will not come back. Very disappointing.

It’s a very central location close to beach, bars, restaurants and shops. For a very basic park it is comparably expensive and also on a very busy road which is quite noisy - especially if your site is on the roadside of the park.

Just to let all know deposits to hold a site in future is 1weeks accommodation as it was only $50 last year & apparently last week $100!! We are not paying $95 per night for 7 nites to hold a site!! $665 in total!! Not in these times!!
Yes it’s a beautiful park but this new policy hits us hard in tough times like now! Have stayed at Mooloolaba & Cotton Tree at least 8 times over the last 4years!
Will now be looking for a park as good closer to home near Ballina in future! Too Greedy!
Sad😞
They don't answer the phone!

Pretty good location, nice amenities such as showers, restrooms and kitchen
Easy access to the beach.
Not to many people around when we were visiting so a bit on the quieter side.
A bit expensive but we only spent a few nights so it wasn’t to bad.

This park is perfectly located within walking distance to the beach, the wharf and the esplanade. Been coming here for a number of years and I love Mooloolaba. However it seems as the price increases, the service declines. Trees around sites need trimming.  I’ve not had the yardman up our end in the 4 weeks we’ve been here. Last year once a week leaves would be blowed & come around whipper snipping. It’s the busiest time of the year and of the two clothes driers, one is broken. Been this way for 4 weeks. There are rules but they are not enforced. While not enforced they will continued to be broken such as parked cars not clear of roadway.
The staff in the office are great, nice and friendly.

A modest caravan park with decent, disabled accessable amenities. Not overly bright at night but allows safety while keeping the camper in mind. Close to Boutique eateries and classic attractions such as the wharf, sea-life, Aquaduck pickup and heaps more. With boating, fishing and beach access close by, you will be struggling to get a better spot over the school holidays. Powered and unpowered sites available with ample room on the provided slab and single car parking provided. It has a coin operated laundry equipped with washers and dryers and communal clothesline for rhose longer stays. Pin entry gates and and security patrols on site during the busy periods mean peace of mind for you and your family. Scooters, bikes and skateboards are encouraged during the day as are ball and yard games. Overall a friendly, family oriented park, lovingly maintained and cared for by its welcoming staff.
Looks lovely, but didn’t stay because the prices are absolute daylight robbery at this time of year
Great spot park and walk to the spit or Alexandra Heads
Great beach great holiday spot

This park has a fantastic location near the beach accessed by 2 gates out the Beach.
It is a  lovely 60 site small park with excellent clean amenities however the Camp Kitchen is one of the worst kitchens around. There are 2 clear blinds on one side & both ends are open to windy conditions giving hardly any protection . There is  also no rubbish bin supplied, no cleaning cloths to wipe down no Television, no toaster or kettle or simple utensils to use.There are some old cookers and air fryers left by the campers. They have 2 BBQ hot plates BBQ, A fridge and a microwave that's it. A Very poor set-up for the rates they charge. Over $90 per night per site at present.
Very good place. But would recommend adding a bin near the bbq. So we don’t have to carry rubbish as far.

Kleiner aber sehr schöner Campingplatz. Die Lage ist ideal, um in Mooloolaba zu sein und dort fußläufig unterwegs zu sein.
Buchung und Check-in waren sehr einfach und komfortabel und der Platz ist sehr sauber. Wir kommen gerne wieder!
Love Mooloolaba but booking our caravan for a couple of nights  I think it is a bit too expensive for us so I will be looking near by
Great park and great location!

We had a few days at this lovely little Park, not a big park which is fine , all facilities are fresh and clean , the grounds are neat and tidy (except when the bush Turkey go digging feel sorry for grounds men) handy to Beach Shop, and loads of place to eat, Great Park, only down fall Traffic racing past Friday nights   we'll be back great Park great area 😀
Still out favourite park to buy far..Great spot great park great staff loved it.
The best that train my knees to walk under sun light
Amazing location, friendly staff.
Going Cashless so we will never stay again..........
This ain't camping

Wow...... what more can I say.
It's a fantastic place to stay. It's not a big park, however it has big features.
Spotlessly clean. Great kitchen and laundry. Great staff.
A 5 minute stroll to the beach, shopping,and restaurants in Mooloolaba.
As far as price goes, it is on the high side. However, you are not paying out money to travel anywhere, so it balances out.
Do yourself a favour and give it a try
Quite small park no pool but very close to beach and town centre . Also very clean  bathrooms

Extremely disappointed by our stay at this "campsite".
We were woken up very aggressively by our plot neighbors at 11pm!!! only because our tent ladder was bothering him to park his car.
Then the person in charge of the campsite came and accused us of taking drugs, when in fact we weren't!
In short, this is a campsite to avoid if you value your peace and quiet.

Absolutely awesome, fantastic service, great facilities, staff exceptionally friendly & helpful.
I'm definitely going back & highly recommend spending time at the Beach Holuday Park Mooloolaba.

Highly recommended.

We visited the Mooloolaba Beach Holiday Park for 16 nights and were allocated a great corner van site on the southern side of the entrance. Note; no cabins there.

The park was refurbished not so long ago and was recommended by a neighbour, so we decided it was time to try it out.

Facilities are well designed  and maintained and each site has a good concrete slab. The location is terrific; close to the beach, patrolled swimming, the Mooloolaba Surf Life Saving Club, a good cluster of shops, cafes and restaurants, some with nice sea views. There is a Coles supermarket within a comfortable walking distance if you want to combine walks and light grocery shopping.

On some evenings, cafes provide local entertainment, adding a nice atmosphere to dining out. One evening, we discovered the Sunset Markets (5-9pm 1st and 3rd Saturdays each month). There are some great food stands and a mix of other temptations, including vinyl records.

So, all up, we had a pleasant holiday with few car trips.
A must visit 😎
I wasn't staying there, but visiting my brother there, it is a good place for everyone.
Lovely clean amenities suitated smack bang in the middle of beautiful Mooloolaba😊
Wonderful campsite. Beach so close and nice. Staff were lovely. Amenities were spotless and well maintained. Campsite central to shops and beach. Will definitely be returning.
Nice park, recently upgraded facilities, located in one of the best locations on the Sunshine Coast.
Very clean and well maintained small caravan park between underwater world village and the beach with Cafe and shops close by
I took my friend to see 👀 were go  take his wife out for a day
Few problems with the access codes to loos
Loved this park, so clean and conveniently located. Reception were more than helpful and friendly. Will definitely be back.
Left two messages in business hours as requested, they could not be bothered to ring me back. Very Poor

Right on the beach with secure gate access. Very good facilities and the staff are very friendly and helpful. The shops and restaurants are alll within 5 minutes walk....One of the best caravan parks we have been to.
The best caravan park for location, included a great beach and town. cleanliness and sites were perfect
